mapper.select: SELECT id, event_date AS eventDate, seat_label AS seatLabel, customer_name AS customerName, phone, people_count AS peopleCount, notes FROM sf_xmas_seat WHERE event_date = #{eventDate} ORDER BY seat_label ASC
SELECT id, event_date AS eventDate, seat_label AS seatLabel, customer_name AS customerName, phone, people_count AS peopleCount, notes FROM sf_xmas_seat WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sf_xmas_seat (event_date, seat_label, customer_name, phone, people_count, notes) VALUES (#{eventDate}, #{seatLabel}, #{customerName}, #{phone}, #{peopleCount}, #{notes})
mapper.update: UPDATE sf_xmas_seat SET event_date = #{eventDate}, seat_label = #{seatLabel}, customer_name = #{customerName}, phone = #{phone}, people_count = #{peopleCount}, notes = #{notes} WHERE id = #{id}
